title: Avatar Product and Creator Sanction List - June 2026
original_title: Avatar Product and Creator Sanction List - June 2026
author: MSW_Creators
summary: MapleStory Worlds published its June 2026 enforcement results for avatar products and creators that violated intellectual-property or platform policies. Confirmed products were permanently restricted, while creators received release, play, or cashout restrictions according to severity.

images.alt: Avatar Product and Creator Sanction List - June 2026

sections.title: Policy action
items: Avatar products confirmed to infringe intellectual property or violate operating policy were permanently restricted.
The notice includes 527 accounts receiving a 30-day new-product release restriction and lists additional creator sanctions by severity.
Available penalties include permanent new-product release restrictions and three- or six-month cashout restrictions.

sections.title: Scope
items: The enforcement covers Worlds or products that violate the Creator Terms of Use or operating policy.
Nexon states that reported products will continue to be reviewed after publication of the monthly list.
